items.title: Elephant Seal Scolds Penguins in Superb Photo Shortlisted for Wildlife Award

items.summary: At InfoComm 2026 in Las Vegas, Mavis has pushed out a substantial update to Mavis Studio, the touch-first iPad live production app it only launched at NAB a few months ago. The new release adds an NDI…

items.title: RingThing Focus Ring Label Maker App for ARRI Hi-5, WCU-4, and Tilta Nucleus-M II Released
items.summary: RingThing is an iPhone app that lets you create custom focus, iris, or zoom scale labels for ARRI Hi-5, WCU-4, and Tilta Nucleus-M II hand units. This can help skip the tedious process of marking focu…

items.title: The Unapologetic Soul: Why I Keep Returning to the 14-Year-Old Leica M9 Monochrom
